one_line_summary: Validates object state; calls fallback handler if flag clear, else triggers debug crash via BRK if required function pointer is non-null.

title: Synchronous NtWriteFile Wrapper with Error Handling
one_line_summary: Performs asynchronous NtWriteFile, waits for completion via WaitForSingleObject, handles STATUS_PENDING loops, converts NTSTATUS to Win32 errors, and triggers a panic-like breakpoint on fatal I/O errors.

title: Debug Symbol Section Parser
one_line_summary: Validates and processes tagged debug symbol entries (starting with '#') in aligned structs, resolving function pointers and triggering crash on validation failure.

title: DecodeHexToUtf8
one_line_summary: Decodes hex input (or partial UTF-8 bytes) into a buffer, validates UTF-8 correctness, updates pointers in the input struct, and returns a status code; panics on internal errors.

title: Punycode Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes a Punycode-encoded ASCII string into Unicode codepoints using base-36 decoding, with overflow checks, error logging, and UTF-16 output conversion.

title: TLS Runtime Entry/Exit Handler
one_line_summary: Manages thread-local runtime state via TLS dispatch, atomic counters, and conditional cleanup, with debugger breakpoints for error handling and version guards.

title: Conditional Initialization with Redacted String
one_line_summary: Checks flag at *(X0 + 0x48); if non-zero, initializes a stack struct and calls sub_140016244 with "<redacted>".

title: Base62 Recursive Parser
one_line_summary: Parses base-62 numbers (with 'IB_', 'IE', 'BE' prefixes) from a structured buffer, supports tail-call recursion up to depth 0x1F4, and returns 0/1 for success or 2 for errors.

title: Recursive Numeric Token Parser
one_line_summary: Parses and evaluates numeric tokens from a string, supporting radix-based digit accumulation, recursion depth limiting (500), syntax validation, and error reporting.

title: Auto-sizing GetCurrentDirectoryW Wrapper
one_line_summary: Retries GetCurrentDirectoryW with exponentially increasing buffer size on ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER (0x7A) until successful or an unexpected error triggers an assert.

title: Hex String Formatter Helper
one_line_summary: Prepares arguments and calls a helper function to format the hex string '0x0123456789ABCDEF' into a buffer, using stack-relative addressing and standard AAPCS64 calling convention conventions.

title: Conditional Buffer Update Copy
one_line_summary: Updates a buffer descriptor in-place by copying up to X2 bytes from (source + base) to base, after validating bounds via a helper function.

title: SEH Error Message Formatter
one_line_summary: Prepares and invokes FormatMessageW to generate human-readable error messages, with fallback logging and crash reporting via structured exception handling.

title: Conditional Safe Buffer Copy
one_line_summary: Performs a conditional memcpy of half the count bytes from a struct's internal buffer, handling overflow via a helper routine.

title: Memory Alignment Helper
one_line_summary: Aligns or reserves memory of size X1 relative to X0, using sub_140007AE8 for base logic and mask-based adjustment for larger sizes.

title: ScanBufferForCharE
one_line_summary: Scans a buffer for ASCII 'E' (0x45), updates internal index on match, and returns iteration count; optionally invokes callbacks per byte to control early exit.

title: UTF-16 to UTF-8 Converter
one_line_summary: Decodes UTF-16 input (at X0) to UTF-8 (at X1), handling surrogates and variable-width sequences, updating pointers and returning byte count.

title: InitContextWithHexKey
one_line_summary: Initializes a context (e.g., logging/crypto) by calling sub_140011760 with hex key 0x0123456789ABCDEF and config flags W1=1, W3=2.

title: Conditional Vtable Initialization Gate
one_line_summary: Invokes a vtable method only if a flag is clear, sets the flag to true only on specific success (X1 == 0xA), then delegates to another vtable function.

title: Bigint Halving Division
one_line_summary: Performs recursive halving of a 128-bit big integer (stored at *X0) while adjusting for borrow and parity, using X2 as iteration count, likely part of a division-by-power-of-two or generalized big-integer division routine.

title: ComputeExtensionOrSegmentSize
one_line_summary: Parses a null-terminated string to compute and store file extension-related size/type metadata (or canonicalized segment length) in an output struct based on string content and a type byte, returning error on invalid type or overflow.

title: UTF-8 Code Point Encoder
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit Unicode code point (W1) as 1–4 variable-length UTF-8 bytes at [X0+8], updating the pointer at [X0] and delegating to a helper for overflow/special cases.

title: UUID/ID Validator
one_line_summary: Parses and validates a UUID-like identifier string using UTF-8 decoding and magic constant checks, with structured error handling and soft-breaks on validation failures.

title: Quoted String Parser (C-style)
one_line_summary: Parses and validates single-quoted C-style string literals, handling escaped quotes and return 1 on success (valid termination) or 0 on failure (null input or malformed).

title: Validate PE32+ Image and Check MSB of DataDirectory Size
one_line_summary: Verifies that the memory region is a valid 64-bit (PE32+) PE image and checks if the Size field of a specific data directory entry has its most significant bit (bit 31) set.

title: Tagged Pointer Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Dispatches control flow based on 2-bit tag in `*[X0]` to handle variants: 0→tailcall, 1→unknown variant, 2→structured parsing, 3→error/extended handling.

title: UTF-8 Validator
one_line_summary: Validates a byte slice as UTF-8 using SIMD-optimized scanning and fallback, returning either a validated &str pointer+length or error details.

title: Aligned Heap Allocator Helper
one_line_summary: Allocates small (e.g., 0x18-byte), 8-byte-aligned heap objects using a custom suballocator, handles initialization based on flag bits, and copies data into the allocated region.

title: Smart Pointer Decay/Weaken
one_line_summary: Decays or weakens a custom smart pointer by decrementing reference count, invoking cleanup hooks, and returning whether the managed resource is still valid.

title: Directive Parser with Alignment & Error Handling
one_line_summary: Parses '#'-prefixed directives after validating pointer alignment and argument validity, invoking structured callbacks or triggering debug traps on failure.

title: Safe UTF-8 String Validator
one_line_summary: Validates and parses UTF-8 strings with escape sequence support, aborting on malformed input via BRK #1.

title: CRT Startup Manager
one_line_summary: Thread-safe, one-time CRT initialization and user entry point invocation with proper lock handling, TLS setup, and exit code propagation.

title: UTF-8 to UTF-32 Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes next UTF-8 character from a byte stream to UTF-32, performs strict validity checks (overlong sequences, surrogates, bounds), and reports success/failure with decoded codepoint and length.

title: UTF-8 String Validator/Decoder
one_line_summary: Validates UTF-8 well-formedness, decodes scalar values, parses numeric literals with base detection and special token recognition, and reports errors via BRK traps.

title: HeapFree Wrapper
one_line_summary: Frees a heap block via HeapFree, conditionally selecting the block address based on argument X2's value, then restores stack and callee-saved register before returning.

title: Conditional Callback Executor
one_line_summary: Calls a function pointer at arg1+0x20 with (arg0,arg2) if arg2 != -1, returning (result & 1); otherwise returns (arg3 != 0) if arg2 == -1.

title: Debug Symbol Init for Crash Backtraces
one_line_summary: Thread-safe, lazy-initializes Windows debugging symbols via dbghelp.dll with mutex serialization, used during crash backtrace generation.

title: Char Escape Formatter
one_line_summary: Writes C-style escape sequences (e.g., \n, \t, \uXXXX) for a given character into a buffer, with special handling for common escapes and fallbacks to Unicode or brace-enclosed forms.

title: Token Canonicalizer
one_line_summary: Canonicalizes a token structure by analyzing type, content, and state, updating metadata fields, handling separators and flags, and triggering debug traps on invalid cases.

title: Atomic Test-and-Set Lock Trylock
one_line_summary: Non-blocking atomic attempt to set a lock flag (0→1), returning 0 on success or original value (after slow path) if already set.

title: UTF-8 Decoder/Validator
one_line_summary: Iteratively decodes and validates UTF-8 sequences from a byte range, enforces UTF-8 rules (e.g., continuation bytes, overlong forms), invokes callbacks via a context struct, and advances the input pointer until completion or error.

title: LockAcquireWithDowngrade
one_line_summary: Acquires a 32-bit atomic lock (exclusive/shared) with support for exclusive-to-shared downgrade and conditional wakeups using CAS and STXR/LDXR loops.

title: Thread-Safe Module Init/Fini
one_line_summary: Performs guarded, atomic, retry-aware initialization or finalization of a reference-counted module/object using TLS, spinlocks, and debug traps on failure.

title: UTF-8-safe i64 Parser
one_line_summary: Parses a UTF-8 string slice as a signed 64-bit integer, validating UTF-8 first, then delegating to a standard parsing routine, returning the value or error codes -2 (invalid UTF-8) or -1 (parse failure).

title: UTF-16 to UTF-8 Decoder
one_line_summary: Decodes null-terminated UTF-16 input (X1) into UTF-8 output buffer (X0), handling surrogates, validating input, and reporting length/status via structured output (X13) with strict error handling via BRK.

title: Count Bytes ≥ 'A' in Buffer
one_line_summary: Counts bytes ≥ 'A' using scalar loop for large buffers (>32B), vectorized reduction for 8–32B, and returns 0 for empty buffers.

title: EncodeUnicodeToUTF8
one_line_summary: Encodes a Unicode codepoint (W1) into UTF-8 bytes (1–4), updates buffer pointer/length, and returns success (1) or error (0).

title: Guard Byte Check at [X0]
one_line_summary: Asserts that the byte at address X0 equals 1; crashes with BRK #1 in debug if not.

title: Lazy Import Resolver Stub
one_line_summary: Resolves a critical imported function pointer on first use via a resolver, and triggers a breakpoint if resolution fails or the stub is unexpectedly invoked.

title: Masked Pattern Matcher
one_line_summary: Compares a 32-bit masked pattern (offset from base via X1) against a buffer’s data, using byte-by-byte for small counts (≤3) or 4-byte chunks for larger payloads, returning 1 on match or 0.

title: TLS Counter Init with Atomic Increment
one_line_summary: Atomically increments a thread-local counter using LDXR/STXR, validates TLS struct layout, invokes a dispatcher/hook, and executes setup/destructor callbacks on success—or triggers a BRK assertion on failure.

title: Buffer Append with Bounds Check
one_line_summary: Appends len bytes from src to a managed buffer, reallocating if insufficient space, and updates buffer metadata.

title: Recursive Expression Parser
one_line_summary: Parses a small DSL expression grammar (tokens N, O, R, E) using recursive descent with a 500-level recursion limit and error reporting.

title: Rust-like Type Parser
one_line_summary: Recursive descent parser for a Rust-inspired type DSL, validating and consuming input tokens (e.g., &mut, *const, primitives, dyn), returning 1 on full success or 0 on error with state tracked in a struct at X0.

title: Struct Init Wrapper
one_line_summary: Wraps sub_1400098F8 to initialize a struct via X19: copies SIMD data on success, or stores -2 sentinel on -1 error.

title: Rust Panic Handler
one_line_summary: Formats and reports Rust panics by processing panic payloads, converting UTF-8 data to strings, and delegating to a platform-specific termination routine.

title: UTF-8 Prefix Matcher (???)
one_line_summary: Validates UTF-8 input and checks if the byte slice starts with the 3-byte prefix '???', returning 1 on match (possibly advancing the slice) or 0 otherwise.

title: Conditional Initialization Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Checks whether the count/flag at [X0+0x18] is -1 (error/uninitialized), 0 (empty), or positive (valid), calling sub_14000438C unconditionally and dispatching to sub_140001040 only for positive counts.

title: Robust Identifier Parser
one_line_summary: Parses and validates a numeric/string identifier (hex/base62-like) from a struct with strict character, length, and bounds checks, returning 1 on success or 0 on failure (including BRK #1 errors).

title: Condvar Wait Stub (Windows)
one_line_summary: Windows sync wait routine that checks a flag, optionally wakes via WaitOnAddress, and delegates to OS wait APIs through a function pointer in the lock object.

title: Aligned Method Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Validates pointer alignment, conditionally invokes a vtable function, and always calls sub_140001040 with adjusted pointer and fixed arguments.

title: Formatting Trait Deserializer
one_line_summary: Undeserialized and validates a formatting trait object via strict tag checks (X8 & 3 == 1), dispatches vtable methods (e.g., destructor, conversion), and returns the deserialized pointer or 0 on failure.

title: Futex-Style Synchronization Routine
one_line_summary: Implements a low-level wait/lock primitive using atomic CAS on a global counter, per-thread TLS context, and Windows WakeByAddressSingle for thread coordination.

title: Debug Breakpoint Stub
one_line_summary: Sets up context, logs/handles via helper, then triggers a debug breakpoint (BRK #1) to halt execution for debugging or crash analysis.

title: Conditional State Initialization
one_line_summary: Conditionally invokes a setup function via vtable-like offset if a secondary function pointer is non-null, otherwise skips to epilogue.

title: Safe Bounds-Checked Buffer Copy
one_line_summary: Performs a bounds-checked memory copy from a buffer into a potentially overlapping destination, using flags to determine allocation path or safe copy via helper routines.

title: Checked 64-bit Multiplication Helper
one_line_summary: Performs safe unsigned 64-bit multiplication with overflow detection, optional bounds checking, and CFG-compliant callback support.

title: Path Normalizer
one_line_summary: Parses and normalizes Windows-style paths by resolving '.' and '..' segments and stripping redundant separators.

title: UTF-8 Encode Unicode Scalar
one_line_summary: Encodes a Unicode code point from W1 into UTF-8 bytes appended to a dynamically growing buffer at X0+8, handling 1–4 byte sequences and managing buffer reallocation as needed.

title: Secure Stack Cookie Reseeding
one_line_summary: Gathers entropy from system timing and process/thread IDs to securely update the stack canary (__security_cookie) for ROP mitigation.

title: Vectorized Line Parser with Callback
one_line_summary: Efficiently scans buffer for newline-terminated lines using SIMD masking and invokes a callback for each line, returning 0 on success or 1 on error.

title: Thread StartupInitializer
one_line_summary: Performs lazy one-time thread setup using atomic initialization guards, resolves a critical function pointer from TLS, sets up vectored exception handling and stack guarantees, then dispatches to the main entrypoint.

title: Format Trait Validator
one_line_summary: Validates formatting trait metadata for an object, checks alignment and function pointers, and triggers a debug breakpoint on invariant violations.

title: IterateAndCallFunctionArray
one_line_summary: Calls each function pointer in a null-terminated array (with CFG validation and PAC prologue/epilogue)

title: VTable Trampoline with Debug Break
one_line_summary: Conditionally dispatches to sub_140001A90 based on LSB of a vtable-loaded value, sets up stack args, triggers BRK #1, and always falls through—acting as a debug-friendly virtual call stub.

title: Conditional Closing Delimiter Printer
one_line_summary: Prints the appropriate closing delimiter (e.g., '}', ']', ')', or ' })') for a nested JSON-like structure based on state flags and object metadata.

title: UTF-8 String Validator/Processor
one_line_summary: Validates UTF-8 string data using internal flags and reference counters, conditionally invoking from_utf8 and handling retries or fallbacks on validation failures.

title: Triple-Value Bounds Validator
one_line_summary: A debug instrumentation routine that validates ordering of three input values (X0, X1, X2) and invokes a helper function with context-specific arguments before triggering a BRK #1 breakpoint.

title: Recursive Rust-Type Parser
one_line_summary: AArch64 recursive descent parser for Rust-style type signatures, using state tracking, recursion limits (max 500), and jump-table dispatch to handle keywords, pointers, references, lifetimes, and traits.

title: Atomic Buffer Append/Resize
one_line_summary: Thread-safe dynamic buffer append or resize using TLS-based context lookup and lock-free atomic operations (LDAXRB/STXRB) to handle concurrent access.

title: Varint Encoder with Custom Headers
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit unsigned integer (W1) into a 1–4 byte UTF-8–style variable-length sequence using custom header bytes (0x80/0xC0/0xE0/0xF0), writes to buffer in struct at X0+0, and triggers cleanup via function pointers at struct offset +8; returns non-zero on success or zero on overflow/failure.

title: Encode Unicode Escape Sequence
one_line_summary: Encodes a character as escape sequence (e.g., \n, \u{XXXX}) into a buffer, handling ASCII escapes, low Unicode via helpers, and higher Unicode as JSON-style \uXXXX or \u{XXXX}.

title: Robust Once-Flag Initialization
one_line_summary: Thread-safe, wait-free (fast path) once-initialization primitive using atomic operations and Windows futex-like WaitOnAddress/WakeByAddressAll, handling unset/in-progress/completed/error states with retry and poison-break semantics.

title: AtomicIncWithThreadPanic
one_line_summary: Atomically increments a global counter using ARMv8-A exclusive loads/stores, validates thread context via sub_1400054E4, optionally invokes a callback, and panics (BRK #0xF003) on conflicts, errors, or invalid states.

title: CRT Startup Initialization Stub
one_line_summary: Initializes Windows SEH-enabled CRT runtime state on ARM64 before transferring control to the main entry point with argc/argv/envp setup.

title: Object Destructor/Cleanup Routine
one_line_summary: Zero-initializes an object and conditionally invokes external cleanup if a vtable callback is set.

title: Encode32ToUTF8AndWrite
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit value as UTF-8 into a stack buffer and writes it via a vtable function, validating pointers, refcounts, and triggering cleanup on success.

title: EH Support Detection
one_line_summary: Checks for STATUS_ACCESS_DENIED (0xC000001D) and presence of MSR DAIFSet instruction to confirm exception handling support, returning 1 if both conditions are met, else 0.

title: Buffer Append with Overflow Handling
one_line_summary: Appends a buffer of size X2 into a managed structure at X0, using memcpy if space permits or invoking growth/error handling otherwise, ensuring null termination or cleanup.

title: Tagged-Pointer Destructor Dispatch
one_line_summary: Dispatches type-specific cleanup by checking tag bits in obj->field_8, invoking vtable functions and a shared deallocator (sub_140001040) if present.

title: Encode Codepoint to UTF-8-like Sequence
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit codepoint loaded from [x0] into 1–4 variable-length bytes (UTF-8-style) based on a flag in *(x1+3), then invokes sub_140011FA4 with the encoded bytes and length.

title: Structured Integer Parser
one_line_summary: Parses signed integer literals from strings into typed output structures with syntax validation, range checks, and error diagnostics.

title: Validate Structured Header
one_line_summary: Validates a header structure by checking field constraints, computing a derived length/offset, bounds-checking against a limit, and verifying trailing content patterns, returning 1 on success or 0/crashing on failure.

title: AVX-512 Math Routine Dispatcher
one_line_summary: Dispatches to AVX-512-optimized math kernels based on control-word flags, handles variable-length data parsing and vector reductions, and uses vtable-based retry logic for error resilience.

title: Trait Validation & Cleanup Handler
one_line_summary: Validates a runtime type/pointer via sub_1400124BC, executes a method from a trait table, cleans up associated resources, and returns 0 on success—otherwise triggers a debug break on invalid trait state.

title: Bounded Char Scanner
one_line_summary: Scans a bounded region of a custom buffer structure for a specific byte (e.g., delimiter), updates internal cursor/length state in-place, and handles errors via debug breaks or early returns.

title: Safe memcpy with metadata callbacks
one_line_summary: Performs a conditional memory copy with alignment/size validation, optional callback invocation based on metadata flags, and structured cleanup.

title: Conditional Dispatcher Guard
one_line_summary: Checks a tag at offset +8 of *X0; if 1, prepares stack and calls sub_14000D3F8, else jumps to fallback handler sub_14000A190.

title: __cxa_end_catch_cleanup
one_line_summary: Safely unwinds and cleans up an exception object by validating pointers, invoking destructors, and deallocating memory, returning zero on success.

title: IDNA Punycode Decoder
one_line_summary: Parses and decodes Punycode-encoded domain name labels, implementing IDNA logic with base-36 decoding, recursion limits, and comprehensive error handling.

title: Size Computation for Packed 16B-Aligned Buffer
one_line_summary: Computes buffer size for a custom packed format of 16-byte-aligned entries, with special handling for '#'-prefixed entries and debug/validation guards.

title: UTF-8 Encode 32-bit Scalar to Growable Buffer
one_line_summary: Encodes a 32-bit integer as 1–4-byte UTF-8-like sequence into a dynamic buffer, auto-flushing/resizing when space is insufficient.

title: Bytecode/DSL Parser (sub_14000E044)
one_line_summary: Recursive parser for a custom typed DSL/bytecode, dispatching on input bytes to handle keywords, type operators, and nested constructs, with recursion depth limiting and diagnostic error reporting.

title: RwLock Read-Lock Acquisition with Backoff
one_line_summary: Acquires a read lock on a 32-bit lock variable using atomic LDAXR/STXR, exponential backoff via ISB loops, and OS-assisted WaitOnAddress under contention, with strict reader-count overflow checks leading to crash-on-assert.

title: Parse Numeric Prefix with Separator
one_line_summary: Parses a numeric prefix (base 10/16/36) from a string, allowing '_' separators, validates trailing uppercase letters, and returns parsed count/end pointer or zeroed output on error.

title: Conditional Struct Comparator
one_line_summary: Returns 1 if two variable-length structures are equal under a custom scheme: normalized (byte-5 clamped ≥0) first-byte mismatch → 0; equal non-zero normalized values → 1 (shallow); equal zero normalized values (original byte ≤5) → deep comparison of pointers at offsets +8, +0x10, +0x18, +0x20 via memcmp or pointer equality.
